skills.description: Invisible orchestrator that configures the active workspace context based on the user's natural language intent.
trigger_conditions: User assigns a new high-level objective
Currently loaded skills are clearly mismatched
anti_triggers: Minor follow-ups within an already well-matched context

skills.description: any input (code, docs, papers, images) → knowledge graph → clustered communities → HTML + JSON + audit report
trigger_conditions: User asks to build a graph of the current directory or workspace
User wants to understand the relationship or shortest path between concepts
User needs to extract architecture, god nodes, or surprising connections
User asks to explain a specific codebase node or module comprehensively
User adds a URL or document to the raw knowledge folder
anti_triggers: Standard file editing without requiring structural context
